title: Orvax IV
content:
{{Top|canon=Orvax}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Orvax_IV-DT4.jpg]] |name=Orvax IV |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the entirety of the grid square Q-17 portion of the [[Dalchon sector/Legends|Dalchon sector]] in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] as defined by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |sector=[[Dalchon sector/Legends|Dalchon sector]] |system=[[Orvax system/Legends|Orvax system]] |coordinates=R-17 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons=At least 4 |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Meeto's residence]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=*[[T'surr (species)|T'surr]] *Various others |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports=[[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]]
Luxury Goods |exports=[[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|For a slave, Orvax is the living hell of the galaxy. There is no worse place that I know of.|[[Mezgraf]]|''[[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere]]''}} '''Orvax IV''' was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave trade]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Slaves were stored in dungeons here before being sold off to slave owners. The slave traders lived in the upper levels of the cities. Members of the [[T'surr (species)|T'surr]] [[Species/Legends|species]] worked as security staff. ==History== [[File:Orvax_IV.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Slave market on Orvax IV.]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Maul]] assumed that [[Kilindi Matako|Kilindi]], a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] and fellow cadet of his at the [[Orsis Academy]], was from her [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Glee Anselm/Legends|Glee Anselm]]. She told him that she had been a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] on Orvax IV, until she had killed the large family that owned her, and escaped, which caught [[Trezza]]'s attention.''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' Following the [[Cleansing of New Plympto|Battle of Half-Axe Pass]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] deported captured [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] [[Gender/Legends|women]] and [[Youngling/Legends|children]] there. Darth Vader, upon discovering this in a debriefing with the 501st Legion, grew despondent of the news due to his former status as a slave on Tatooine. [[Dass Jennir]] and the crew of the ''[[Uhumele]]'' attempted to [[Mission to Orvax IV|rescue]] [[Bomo Greenbark]]'s family, only to find that his wife [[Mesa Greenbark|Mesa]] had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] and his daughter [[Resa Greenbark|Resa]] sold to [[Dezono Qua]] on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] (thus sealing her fate, as Qua regularly bought a child slave to eat). It was on this planet that [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]] purchased [[Droopy McCool/Legends|Droopy McCool]], naming him "Snit". ==Behind the scenes== On the Outer Rim map of [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]], Orvax IV is mistakenly placed in the [[Savareen sector/Legends|Savareen sector]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Orvax IV}} *''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Dark Times 2|''Dark Times'' 2]] {{Mo}} *[[Dark Times 3|''Dark Times'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] *[[Dark Times 6|''Dark Times'' 6]] {{Mo}} *[[Dark Times 7|''Dark Times'' 7]] {{Mo}} *[[Dark Times 16|''Dark Times'' 16]] {{Mo}} *{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1stm}} {{ID|Ovrax IV}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|46|MAX 1-2|The Max Rebo Band}} {{ID|Ovrax IV}} *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stID|Orvax IV}} *{{DarkHorse|url=Features/Desktops/547/Star-Wars-Galaxy-Map|text=Star Wars Galaxy Map}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] *[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Orvax IV |it=Orvax IV |nl=Orvax IV |pl=Orvax IV |pt=Legends:Orvax IV }} [[Category:Dalchon sector locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]] [[Category:Slavery worlds]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
